approved_decisions.decision: Use the squared James term (weight_kg / height_cm)^2.
Use f18=55 as the Minto Cl1 lean-body-mass center; never use undefined h18.
Use f12=0.0301 as primary and expose f12=0.030 only as a named sensitivity variant.
Propofol uses mg, mg/min, mg/L; remifentanil uses microgram, microgram/min, microgram/L.
Use an exact zero-order-hold augmented matrix exponential for each constant-infusion transition.
Support arbitrary positive exact transitions, 10-second future controller transitions, and 1-second diagnostic snapshots without mandatory substeps.
Use zero A1/A2/A3/Ce only for induction-oriented synthetic Stage I validation; do not implement maintenance initialization.
Disable Gaussian BIS noise and do not create a noise interface in Stage I.
Disable random effect-site concentration drop and do not implement its sensitivity path in Stage I.
